parsed.clarification_question: To clarify the scope of the review, please choose: (1) Focus on technical aspects (conceptual, logical, evidence, novelty), (2) Focus on presentation aspects (structure, writing, citations), (3) Comprehensive review including all aspects.

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to review the section implies assessing and potentially reframing the thesis, gap, and contribution claims, making conceptual reconstruction a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.2: Reviewing the section requires verifying the chain of arguments for logical consistency, positioning it as a central expected responsibility.
rationale.R1.3: A key part of the review is checking if the reported results support the claims, making evidence-claim alignment central.
rationale.R1.4: Evaluating the novelty of RoboJudge against prior works like hand-coded predicates is essential in a research review, hence central.
rationale.R1.5: Assessing the overall structure and narrative arc of the section is part of a standard review, making structural reorganization central.
rationale.R1.6: Reviewing includes polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness, rendering writing polish a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.7: Even without explicit citations, reviewing for accurate attribution to mentioned works like RT-1 and literature coverage is central.
rationale.RX.1: The review should identify any undisclosed uncertainties in the claims or results, making uncertainty disclosure a central cross-cutting responsibility.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims in the advocacy for RoboJudge as a default protocol is crucial in the review, positioning this as central.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring the section adheres to its scope on introducing and evaluating RoboJudge without digressing is a key review aspect, making it central.
rationale.RX.4: Reviewing for potential downstream harms, such as misuse of LLM-based evaluators in manipulation tasks, is relevant and central.
rationale.RX.5: Verifying the provenance of reported metrics and models like GPT-4o ensures traceability, making this a central responsibility in the review.
